source_of_truth: Problem statement business rules (1-16) + API contract; mirrors README.
notes: Master black-box suite. Every case tagged with rule (1-16) and endpoint. status: untested|pass|fail. Placeholders like $ADMIN,$ROOM,$BID,$OTHER_ORG_ROOM,<t>,<now+2h> are filled by the runner. bug field links to BUG_LEDGER.md.

legend.method: HTTP verb, or SEQUENCE/COMPARE/DECODE/CONCURRENT for multi-step or non-HTTP checks
legend.critical: true = high-value case likely to expose a planted bug or a security/contract violation

cases.title: Register unknown org -> admin
cases.expected_behavior: First user in unknown org becomes admin

cases.title: Login unknown org -> 401
cases.expected_behavior: Unknown org treated as invalid creds

cases.title: Refresh rotates tokens
cases.expected_behavior: Refresh returns a new access+refresh pair

cases.title: Refresh token single-use
cases.expected_behavior: Presented refresh token invalidated after one use

cases.title: Logout without token -> 401
cases.expected_behavior: Logout requires a valid access token

cases.title: Access token exp-iat == 900s
cases.expected_behavior: Access token lifetime is exactly 900 seconds
cases.notes: decode JWT payload without verifying signature

cases.title: Blacklisted (logged-out) token -> 401
cases.expected_behavior: Revoked token rejected on later use

cases.title: List rooms in caller's org
cases.expected_behavior: Returns rooms for caller's org ordered by id

cases.title: Admin creates room
cases.expected_behavior: Admin creates a room in own org

cases.title: Room list is org-scoped
cases.expected_behavior: Caller never sees another org's rooms

cases.title: Availability lists busy intervals sorted
cases.expected_behavior: Confirmed bookings on date returned as sorted busy intervals

cases.title: New booking appears immediately
cases.expected_behavior: Availability reflects newly created booking at once

cases.title: Cancel reflected in availability
cases.expected_behavior: Cancelled booking removed from busy immediately

cases.title: Only bookings starting that UTC date
cases.expected_behavior: Bookings starting on other dates excluded

cases.title: Stats equal DB-derived values
cases.expected_behavior: count/revenue always match confirmed bookings (create then cancel)

cases.title: Stats consistent after concurrent bursts
cases.expected_behavior: Stats reconcile with bookings after concurrency

cases.title: Past start (no grace) -> 400
cases.expected_behavior: start_time strictly future; any past rejected

cases.title: Near-future start accepted
cases.expected_behavior: Start a few minutes ahead is valid

cases.title: Response datetimes carry UTC designator
cases.expected_behavior: All response datetimes end with Z or +00:00

cases.title: Cancelled booking does not block
cases.expected_behavior: Overlap with a cancelled booking is allowed

cases.title: Quota holds under concurrency
cases.expected_behavior: Never exceeds 3 confirmed in window under concurrency

cases.title: 21st request in 60s -> 429
cases.expected_behavior: 20/60s per user; all requests count; 21st rejected

cases.title: List ascending by start_time
cases.expected_behavior: Sorted asc start_time, ties asc id

cases.title: Equal start_time ties by ascending id
Detail start_time is the booking start
Detail includes refunds array
cases.expected_behavior: Cancelled booking detail lists refund entries

cases.title: Admin can read any org booking
cases.expected_behavior: Admin reads any booking in org

cases.title: Exactly one RefundLog per cancel
cases.expected_behavior: A cancelled booking has exactly one RefundLog

cases.title: Non-owner member cannot cancel -> 404
cases.expected_behavior: Only owner or org admin may cancel

cases.title: Admin can cancel any org booking
Concurrent cancel -> single refund
cases.expected_behavior: Only one cancel succeeds; exactly one RefundLog

cases.title: Rooms with zero bookings included
cases.expected_behavior: Every org room appears even with 0 bookings

cases.title: Date range inclusive [from,to] UTC
cases.expected_behavior: Bookings on from and to dates included

cases.title: Report reflects new booking immediately
cases.path: GET report, create booking, GET report
cases.expected_behavior: Report is not stale after create

cases.title: Export cannot leak other org
cases.expected_behavior: Foreign-org room export blocked; no rows leak
